name: golang-github-golang-protobuf-1-5-dev
title: golang-github-golang-protobuf-1-5-dev
summary: Go support for protocol buffers (version v1.5.x)
description:
Go support for protocol buffers (version v1.5.x)
This module (github.com/golang/protobuf) contains Go bindings for protocol
buffers.
.
v1.5.x implements Go APIv2 for protocol buffers.
.
For APIv2, see  https://go.dev/blog/protobuf-apiv2.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-golang-protobuf-1-5-dev because Go support for protocol buffers (version v1.5.x).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-golang-protobuf-1-5-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-golang-protobuf-1-5-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-golang-protobuf-1-5-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
